MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Jan-04-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court adopted its tentative ruling. ATTORNEY MARK L. WEBB, ESQ.'S MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL FOR EMILY PETIT AND VITAL RECORDS is granted. 1) Counsel to advise client of necessity of serving lawsuit if she wants to proceed with it. 2) Counsel to advise client regarding case management conference on January 16, 2016. Order signed.
